reasoning: MU stock has seen a massive parabolic run, increasing from around ~$70 in April 2025 to over ~$218 by late October 2025 (October 24 close of $218.84). Still, supported by the strong structural tailwinds in MU's core business, I assign a slight bullish edge for the continuing momentum.
